mapper.select: select bh.id, bh.user_id, bh.room_id, bh.browse_time, ri.room_number, ri.rent, ai.name as apartment_name, ai.district_name, ai.city_name, ai.province_name from browsing_history as bh left join room_info as ri on bh.room_id = ri.id and ri.is_deleted = 0 and ri.is_release = 1 left join apartment_info as ai on ri.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 and ai.is_release = 1 where bh.user_id = #{userId} and bh.is_deleted = 0 order by bh.browse_time desc
select name, url from graph_info where item_type = 2 and item_id = #{roomId} and is_deleted = 0
